author: Community

detachment_rules.name: 战斗条令
detachment_rules.timing: 分遣队规则 - 格拉迪乌斯特遣队
detachment_rules.summary:
在你的指挥阶段开始时，you can select one of the Combat Doctrines listed below. 直到你下个指挥阶段开始时，that Combat Doctrine is active and its effects apply to all ADEPTUS ASTARTES units 来自你军队的. You can only select each Combat Doctrine once per battle. Devastator Doctrine
The Codex Astartes details the strategic value of overwhelming firepower applied to key targets while advancing into position to eliminate threats.
This unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advance.
Tactical Doctrine
As the warring armies close upon one another and vicious fire-fights erupt, the Codex lays out strategies for swiftly seizing the initiative and combining versatility with firepower.
This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fallback.
Assault Doctrine
The Codex Astartes leaves no doubt that the killing blow in most engagements must be delivered with a decisive close-quarters strike. It presents plentiful tactical means to achieve this end.
This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advance.
detachment_rules.source: Wahapedia CSV / 格拉迪乌斯特遣队

detachment_rules.name: 帝国之盾
detachment_rules.timing: 分遣队规则 - 铁砧攻城特遣队
detachment_rules.summary: Ranged weapons equipped by ADEPTUS ASTARTES models 来自你军队的 拥有 [HEAVY] 能力. 如果该武器已拥有此能力，each time an attack is made with that weapon, 若攻击模型所在单位本回合保持静止，致伤掷骰结果 +1.
detachment_rules.source: Wahapedia CSV / 铁砧攻城特遣队

detachment_rules.name: 装甲之怒
detachment_rules.timing: 分遣队规则 - 铁暴矛头
detachment_rules.summary: Once per phase for each ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit in 你的军队, you can re-roll one 命中掷骰, one 致伤掷骰 or one 伤害掷骰 made for a model in that unit.

detachment_rules.name: 近距歼灭
detachment_rules.timing: 分遣队规则 - 烈焰风暴突击部队
detachment_rules.summary: Ranged weapons equipped by ADEPTUS ASTARTES models 来自你军队的 拥有 [ASSAULT] 能力, and each time an attack made with such a weapon targets a unit within 12", add 1 to the 力量属性 of that attack.
detachment_rules.source: Wahapedia CSV / 烈焰风暴突击部队

detachment_rules.name: 闪电突击
detachment_rules.timing: 分遣队规则 - 风暴枪骑特遣队
detachment_rules.summary: ADEPTUS ASTARTES units 来自你军队的 are eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which they Advance or Fallback.
detachment_rules.source: Wahapedia CSV / 风暴枪骑特遣队

detachment_rules.name: 暗影宗师
detachment_rules.timing: 分遣队规则 - 先锋矛头
detachment_rules.summary: 每次有远程攻击以an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit 来自你军队的, unless the attacking model is within 12", 命中掷骰结果 -1 and the target 拥有 掩体收益 against that attack.

detachment_rules.name: 狂热连祷
detachment_rules.timing: 分遣队规则 - 愤怒巡征
detachment_rules.summary:
在战斗轮开始时，you can select one of the Litanies listed below. If you do, until the end of the battle round, that Litany is active and its effects apply to all Adeptus Astartes Infantry and Adeptus Astartes Mounted units 来自你军队的.
Chorus of Relentless Hate
Add 2" to the 移动属性 of models in 该单位 and add 1 to Advance 掷骰 made for it.
Rite of Perfervid Wrath
Add 1 to the 力量属性 of melee 本单位模型装备的武器.
CHANT OF DEATHLESS DEVOTION
Models in 该单位 have a 5+ invulnerable save against 远程攻击s.
限制
Your army can include 黑色圣堂 units, but it cannot include ADEPTUS ASTARTES units drawn from any other Chapter.

detachment_rules.name: 正义狂热
detachment_rules.timing: 分遣队规则 - 狂烈伴军
detachment_rules.summary:
You can re-roll Advance and 冲锋掷骰 made for ADEPTUS ASTARTES units 来自你军队的.
限制
Your army can include 黑色圣堂 units, but it cannot include any ADEPTUS ASTARTES units drawn from any other Chapter.

detachment_rules.name: 净化与神圣化
detachment_rules.timing: 分遣队规则 - 昭雪特遣队
detachment_rules.summary:
- 每次有攻击以an Ancient unit 来自你军队的, if that unit is within range of one or more objective markers and the 力量属性 of that attack is greater than the 韧性属性 of that unit, 致伤掷骰结果 -1.
- Each time a Crusader Squad unit 来自你军队的 makes a Righteous Zeal move, that unit can end that move as close as possible to the closest objective marker instead of as close as possible to the closest 敌方单位.
限制
Your army can include 黑色圣堂 units, but it cannot include any ADEPTUS ASTARTES units drawn from any other Chapter.

detachment_rules.name: 震慑突击
detachment_rules.timing: 分遣队规则 - 神锤突击部队
detachment_rules.summary:
- Each time an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit 来自你军队的 声明冲锋, 如果它本回合曾从运输载具中下车，after selecting the targets of that charge, select one of those targets; that 敌方单位 must take a 战斗冲击测试.
- Each time a model in an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit 来自你军队的 makes a 近战攻击, if it disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn, 命中掷骰结果 +1.
限制
Your army can include 黑色圣堂 units, but it cannot include any ADEPTUS ASTARTES units drawn from any other Chapter.
detachment_rules.source: Wahapedia CSV / 神锤突击部队

detachment_rules.name: 联锁战术
detachment_rules.timing: 分遣队规则 - 堡垒特遣队
detachment_rules.summary:
Adeptus Astartes Battleline units 来自你军队的:
- Are eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which they Advance or Fallback.
- Are eligible to start to perform an Action in a turn in which they Advance or Fallback.
Each time an ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE unit 来自你军队的 is 被选中进行攻击, after resolving those attacks, select one 敌方单位 hit by one or more of those attacks. 直到本回合结束，that 敌方单位 is auspex scanned. Each time an ADEPTUS ASTARTES model 来自你军队的 makes an attack that targets an auspex scanned unit, re-roll a 命中掷骰 of 1.

detachment_rules.name: 快速空降部署
detachment_rules.timing: 分遣队规则 - 轨道突击部队
detachment_rules.summary:
在声明战斗编成步骤开始时，select a number of ADEPTUS ASTARTES units (excluding Titanic units) 来自你军队的 based on the battle size, as shown below. Models in those units 拥有 Deep Strike ability.
BATTLE SIZE NUMBER OF UNITS Incursion 2 Strike Force 3 Onslaught 4
Each time an ADEPTUS ASTARTES model 来自你军队的 makes an attack, 如果它于本回合被部署到战场上，re-roll a 致伤掷骰 of 1. If it disembarked from a Drop Pod this turn, re-roll a 命中掷骰 of 1 as well.
detachment_rules.source: Wahapedia CSV / 轨道突击部队
